name: breadbank
description: Run the BreadBank backend API and frontend together.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend/breadBank run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend/breadBank install
scripts.kill-ports: powershell -NoProfile -Command "foreach ($p in 3000,9000) { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; 'Ports 3000 and 9000 cleared'"
